Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x16E6 "TORNADOLOWLEVEL-16E6" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "TLL - Tornado Low Level.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the JMP $1234 instruction at $1143 to be JMP $CA00 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $CA00 to check the fire button in port 2 - if pressed, then it sets A to $33 and jumps to $C00E, causing the game to start. If not pressed, the routine then jumps to $1234 to carry on the normal code flow. 3. Changed the LDA $01 instruction at $1181 to be LDA $02 instead to default to joystick. 4. Changed the STA $04CD instruction at $1179, and the STA $D8CD instruction at $117E to be STA $04F5 and STA $D8F5 respectively to correctly place the currently selected control cursor on joystick in port 2.
The loading screen is from the Spectrum version
